name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.AnimPoseHelper.ConnectedLeftHand
summary: Is the left hand constrained to the world/ an object: -1=auto decide by impact info, 0=no, 1=part fully constrained (not implemented:, 2=part point constraint, 3=line constraint).
remarks:
Default value = 0.
            Min value = -1.
            Max value = 2.
